of individual states in the Co-59(n,2n) and Co-59(n,
inl) have been done (table 7 and 8 in NP/A,307,445).
.Corrections for gamma ray and neutron attenuation
in the sample,detector efficiency and geometrical
factors have been applied.
The errors of the cross sections have been
calculated from the statistical accuracy of the
measurements
